title: Bootstrap runtime ed executor reale
purpose: Store the latest worker boot record alongside version/engine/bundle identity.
Confirm the synchronous gate (A5) blocked Hello from being sent on a malformed boot.
Drives ops triage via stable per-step codes (e.g. engine_selftest_baseline_mismatch, tools.ffprobe_missing, bundle_version_mismatch).

playbook.code_grep: code="<X>" — replace <X> with one of: engine_self_render, tools.ffprobe_missing, tools.ffmpeg_missing, output_dir.readonly, output_dir.unwritable, bundle_version_mismatch, engine_selftest_baseline_mismatch
playbook.step_grep: step="<X>" — replace <X> with one of: bundle_hash, ffmpeg, output_dir, engine_self_render
playbook.sha_baseline_regen: make bootstrap-selftest-regenerate APPROVE_REGEN=1 (gated by manual approval; bumps VERSION.txt simultaneously)
playbook.smoke_in_ci: make bootstrap-smoke (must run on a CI host with the C++ engine binary installed; emits a TTY-shaped stdout)

engine_missing_canary.reminder: RW-PROD-003 §4: a worker without the C++ engine MUST NOT enter the master registry. Failing this step exits 1 BEFORE Hello is sent.

bundle_mismatch_canary.reminder: VELOX_BUNDLE_HASH env override OR a re-deploy mismatch. Either fix the override OR re-run gen-production-pki.sh on the canonical bundle.

tools_ffprobe_missing_canary.reminder: Docker layer shadowed ffmpeg with a stub. Re-install the canonical ffmpeg layer from the bundle recipe.

output_dir_readonly_canary.reminder: /tmp/velox/scene-composite is on a read-only mount. Re-mount with rw or change VELOX_OUTPUT_DIR.

engine_selftest_baseline_mismatch_canary.reminder: Engine boot OK but rendered bytes differ from the committed SHA. Either the C++ binary drifted OR the baseline is stale. Bump VERSION.txt + regenerate.

engine_selftest_baseline_sha256.placeholder_status: RW-PROD-003 PRE-RELEASE: real value must be regenerated by `make bootstrap-selftest-regenerate APPROVE_REGEN=1` after the C++ engine build is pinned.
